author: pandanocturne
description: A powerful search UI that provides AND/OR/NOT operators and easy access to search filters. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: PandaNocturne
manifest.description: A powerful search UI that provides AND/OR/NOT operators and easy access to search filters.
manifest.name: Advanced Search UI

name: Advanced Search UI

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## English

### ✨ New features / capabilities

- **Floating panel**: when opened, **fills the search field with the current editor selection** (if any).

### 🐛 Fixes

- **Search row**: hides the quick-action button placeholder when no icon is available.

### 📝 Documentation / other

- **Lint**: added Obsidian globals and resolved ESLint warnings.

---

## 中文

### ✨ 新功能/特性

- **悬浮面板**：打开时会将**当前编辑器选中文本**填入检索框（如有选中内容）。

### 🐛 修复

- **检索行**：在无图标时隐藏快捷按钮占位，避免多余空白。

### 📝 文档/其他

- **Lint**：补充 Obsidian 全局变量声明并修复 ESLint 告警。

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## English

### ✨ New features / capabilities

- **Preview window**: header button to **open the current note in a workspace tab** (Markdown keeps the current reading vs editing mode and focuses the new tab).

### ⚙️ Improvements / optimizations

- **Styles**: dropped blanket `!important` where possible; merged duplicate Less selectors; replaced the global `.is-hidden` rule with **scoped** hides under the advanced-search UI containers; preview shell uses **`body .asui-preview-window`** for safer specificity against themes.

### 🌐 Translation / localization

- Added **`FLOATING_NOTE_OPEN_IN_TAB`** strings (English / Chinese) for the new header control.

### 📝 Documentation / other

- **README** / **README_zh**: privacy & data-handling notes (clipboard copy/paste; autocomplete tags/files backed by Obsidian APIs); guidance on **verifiable release builds** and artifact attestations when publishing matching CI artifacts.

---

## 中文

### ✨ 新功能/特性

- **预览小窗**：标题栏新增 **在主工作区标签页打开**（Markdown 保留当前阅读/编辑模式，并聚焦到新标签页）。

### ⚙️ 改进/优化

- **样式**：减少滥用 `!important`；合并重复的 Less 选择器；将原先全局 `.is-hidden` 改为仅作用于高级搜索相关容器；预览外壳使用 **`body .asui-preview-window`** 提升与主题的特异性兼容。

### 🌐 翻译/本地化

- 新增 **`FLOATING_NOTE_OPEN_IN_TAB`** 中英文案。

### 📝 文档/其他

- **README / README_zh**：补充隐私与数据处理说明（剪贴板读写；标签/文件联想依赖 Obsidian 提供的 vault 数据）；说明发布 Release 时与 **CI 构件摘要 / artifact attestation** 对齐的做法。

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## English

### ⚙️ Improvements / optimizations

- Align DOM and window access with Obsidian guidance (`activeDocument` / `activeWindow`) for better compatibility with pop-out windows.
- Replace unsafe `instanceof` checks on DOM nodes with cross-window-safe `Node.instanceOf()` where recommended by the Obsidian plugin linter.
- Prefer `createSpan` for small label elements in the search row toggles.

### 🐛 Fixes

- Raise **`minAppVersion`** to **1.8.7** and update `versions.json` so declared APIs (for example `getLanguage`, `revealLeaf`, `setActiveLeaf`, `getLeaf`, `getMostRecentLeaf`) match the Obsidian versions those calls require.
- Rename an unused callback parameter in `GenericSuggester` to `_evt` to satisfy lint rules.

### 🌐 Translation / localization

- Include Obsidian `getLanguage()` in locale resolution while keeping existing vault-driven fallbacks.

---

## 中文

### ⚙️ 改进/优化

- 按 Obsidian 建议使用 `activeDocument` / `activeWindow` 访问文档与窗口，改善独立窗口（pop-out）场景下的行为一致性。
- 将部分 DOM 的 `instanceof` 判断替换为跨窗口更安全的 `Node.instanceOf()`，以符合 Obsidian 插件 linter 建议。
- 搜索行开关标签改用 `createSpan` 创建，贴合 API 用法。

### 🐛 修复

- 将 **`minAppVersion`** 提升至 **1.8.7** 并同步 `versions.json`，使声明的最低版本与实际使用的 API（如 `getLanguage`、`revealLeaf`、`setActiveLeaf`、`getLeaf`、`getMostRecentLeaf`）一致，消除版本校验错误。
- 将 `GenericSuggester` 中未使用的回调参数重命名为 `_evt`，消除 lint 告警。

### 🌐 翻译/本地化

- 在语言解析链路中加入 Obsidian 的 `getLanguage()`，并保留基于仓库配置的既有回退逻辑。

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## English

### Highlights

- **Picture-in-picture preview:** A header control opens a companion preview pane beside the floating search panel. Search result clicks open **in the preview** instead of forcing a new tab by default. You can edit, toggle reading mode, and close the split.
- **Hover Editor–style architecture:** Preview uses a **popover + leaf/view** model aligned with the [Hover Editor](https://github.com/nothingislost/obsidian-hover-editor) experience.
- **Docking:** Preview can **bind to the floating panel** and stay on the **left or right** based on layout.

### ✨ New

- Pin control for the preview: **pinned** = always visible; **unpinned** = visible only while the floating search panel is **active**, otherwise hidden.
- Preview **settings**: default preview on, default pin off, default view (read / edit, default **edit**), default bind to floating panel (**yes**), preferred bind side (**left** default), preview zoom **0.5–1.0** step **0.1**, default **0.6**.
- **Properties** toggle in the preview header (`alert-circle`): show or hide `metadata-container` in any view via CSS classes.
- Settings simplified to a single **“hide YAML by default”** option (yes); removed the older multi-toggle metadata group.

### 🐛 Fixes

- White flash / blank screen while **resizing** the preview.
- Read/edit header button **out of sync** when switching modes with **native Obsidian shortcuts**.
- **Duplicate tooltips** on icon buttons (removed redundant native `title`; keep Obsidian’s dark tooltip from `aria-label`).
- After docking the floating panel at the **app title bar**, further drags could drag the **OS window** instead.
- **Arrow keys, Home, End** could not move the caret in criteria inputs (search leaf capture); inputs use `type="text"` instead of `type="search"` where needed.

### ⚙️ Improvements

- Read/edit control: tooltip **“Toggle reading / editing mode”**; if state is unknown, the icon defaults to **reading**.
- **Lint / API:** ESLint cleanups; stop using deprecated `workspace.activeLeaf` (track via `active-leaf-change`, fallback `getMostRecentLeaf`). Preview positioning/z-index uses `setCssProps` where appropriate.
- **Refactor:** Root `main` entry and `AdvancedSearchCoordinator` split; styles organized as LESS modules under `styles/`.
- **Chore:** Unused settings-tab styles removed; `en.ts` casing fix.

---

## 中文

### 亮点

- **小窗口预览：** 悬浮面板头部提供「小窗口」按钮，在面板旁打开预览分栏；搜索点击的笔记在 **双栏预览** 中打开，**不默认新开标签**。支持编辑、切换阅读模式、关闭分栏。
- **Hover Editor 式架构：** 预览采用 **popover + leaf/view**，交互与观感对齐 [Hover Editor](https://github.com/nothingislost/obsidian-hover-editor)。
- **绑定与位置：** 预览可 **绑定悬浮面板** 并随布局贴在 **左侧或右侧**。

### ✨ 新功能

- 预览 **固定** 按钮：**不固定** 时仅当悬浮检索面板 **激活** 时显示小窗口，未激活则隐藏；**固定** 时始终显示。
- **预览相关设置：** 默认开启预览、默认固定、默认视图（阅读/编辑，默认 **编辑**）、默认绑定悬浮面板（**是**）、优先绑定侧（**左**）、预览缩放 **0.5～1.0** 步进 **0.1**、默认 **0.6**。
- 预览头部 **属性** 按钮（`alert-circle`）：任意视图下通过 **CSS 类** 控制 `metadata-container` 显示。
- 设置项简化为 **「是否默认隐藏 YAML」**（是），移除原先 metadata 多开关分组。

### 🐛 修复

- 调整预览 **窗口大小** 过程中的 **白屏**。
- 使用 **原生快捷键** 切换阅读/编辑时，头部模式按钮 **未同步**。
- 图标按钮 **双层提示**（去掉多余 `title`，保留基于 `aria-label` 的黑色提示）。
- 悬浮面板拖到 **顶栏** 后，再次拖拽误拖 **系统窗口**。
- 条件行输入框 **方向键 / Home / End** 无法移动光标；必要时将输入框由 `type="search"` 改为 `type="text"`。

### ⚙️ 改进

- 阅读/编辑按钮：提示为 **「切换阅读/编辑模式」**；无法检测状态时图标 **默认阅读**。
- **Lint / API：** 修复 ESLint；弃用 `workspace.activeLeaf`，改为 `active-leaf-change` + `getMostRecentLeaf`；预览定位/层级按需 `setCssProps`。
- **重构：** 根目录 `main` 与 `AdvancedSearchCoordinator` 拆分；样式拆至 `styles/` LESS 模块。
- **杂项：** 移除未用设置页样式；`en.ts` 大小写修正。

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## What's new

### Context menu

- Added **Copy** and **Paste** actions to the group context menu
- Added **Settings** and **Floating panel** actions to the UI toggle context menu

### Floating panel

- Added support for opening the advanced search panel as a floating panel
- Added a sidebar entry and plugin commands for the floating panel

---

## 更新内容

### 右键菜单功能

- 新增分组右键菜单的「复制」「粘贴」功能
- 新增 UI 开关右键菜单的「设置」「悬浮」功能

### 悬浮面板功能

- 支持以悬浮面板方式打开高级检索面板
- 新增悬浮面板侧边栏入口与插件命令

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
## What's new

### Added
- Added support for importing graph color groups
- Added support for using graph color groups together with advanced search conditions

### Improved
- Improved the settings panel layout and interactions
- Updated the Graph button style to use the Obsidian accent color
- Updated the Search button style to use the Obsidian success color
- Unified the hover behavior of action buttons

### Notes
- This release version is `1.4.0`
- Release assets include `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css`

---

## 更新内容

### 新增
- 支持导入图谱颜色组
- 支持将图谱颜色组与高级搜索条件联动使用

### 优化
- 优化设置面板布局与交互
- 调整图谱按钮样式，使用 Obsidian 激活色
- 调整搜索按钮样式，使用 Obsidian 成功色
- 统一操作按钮的悬浮反馈效果

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
**中文**  
修复源码格式中的 ESLint 问题。

---

**English**  
Fixed ESLint issues in source code formatting.

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description: ## 中文版 ### 版本更新说明 本版本引入了一组实验性增强，主要围绕分组搜索、拖拽交互、导入逻辑和图谱联动进行优化。 #### 新增与增强 - 新增实验性分组搜索交互，支持按组组织复杂查询条件 - 新增分组复制功能，可一键复制当前整组条件 - 新增组拖拽能力，支持调整组顺序 - 新增行拖拽能力，支持更灵活地整理查询条件 - 优化导入逻辑，在分组开启或关闭时采用不同的导入策略 - 优化搜索与 graph 视图联动，优先复用已有 graph 标签页 - 修复空条件切换 operator 时误触发自动检索的问题 - 修复分组折叠反馈缺失问题，并补强折叠视觉状态 #### 交互体验优化 - 改进组拖拽时的高亮、插入线和末尾放置反馈 - 优化拖拽过程中的稳定性，减少复杂布局下的排序异常 - 调整样式结构与注释组织，提升后续维护可读性 #### 注意 以上分组、组拖拽、行拖拽等能力目前仍属于实验性功能，建议按需启用，并继续观察在复杂场景下的稳定性。 --- ## English Version ### Release Notes This release introduces a set of experimental enhancements focusing on grouped search, drag-and-drop interactions, import logic, and graph linkage. #### New & Enhanced - Added experimental grouped search interaction, allowing complex query conditions to be organized by groups - Added group duplication feature to copy the entire current group conditions with one click - Added group drag-and-drop capability to reorder groups - Added row drag-and-drop capability for more flexible arrangement of query conditions - Improved import logic with different strategies depending on whether grouping is enabled or disabled - Optimized search and graph view linkage, prioritizing reuse of existing graph tabs - Fixed an issue where changing the operator with empty conditions would incorrectly trigger an automatic search - Fixed missing visual feedback for group collapse/expand, and reinforced collapse visual state #### Interaction Experience Improvements - Improved highlighting, insertion lines, and end-of-list drop feedback during group dragging - Enhanced stability during drag-and-drop, reducing sorting anomalies in complex layouts - Adjusted style structure and comment organization for better maintainability #### Note The above capabilities—grouping, group drag-and-drop, and row drag-and-drop—remain experimental features. It is recommended to enable them as needed and continue monitoring their stability in complex scenarios.

**中文**

releases.author: PandaNocturne
releases.description:
- Added a new toggle button to the Float Search UI, with the option to **default‑expand** the advanced search panel.  
- Introduced a **“Adapt to Float Search”** setting that is enabled by default, allowing seamless integration with the Float Search plugin’s modal and other search views.  
- Fixed a parsing bug that broke case‑sensitive (`match‑case`) handling when importing queries that include a type prefix (e.g., `file:` or `tag:`).  
- Resolved UI scaling issues caused by narrow sidebars by adding an **“Auto‑Scale UI”** option (default off) that automatically shrinks the advanced search UI when the container width becomes too small.  

---

- 为 Float Search 界面新增了切换按钮，并提供 **默认展开** 高级搜索面板的选项。  
- 增加 **“适配 Float Search”** 设置，默认开启，使插件能够在 Float Search 的模态框及其它搜索视图中自动注入高级搜索 UI。  
- 修复了导入查询时大小写（`match‑case`）的解析错误，现可正确处理带有类型前缀（如 `file:`、`tag:`）的查询。  
- 解决了侧边栏过窄导致 UI 失衡的问题，新增 **“自动缩放 UI”** 选项（默认关闭），在容器宽度不足时自动缩小高级搜索面板。
